sourceNotes: Source-backed Agios Efstratios pass 2026-05-28: official/local sources describe Ftelio as a sandy beach with small/fine pebbles, natural oak shade, and easy dirt-road access about 9 km. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Popular source-backed confidence pass BG 2026-06-02: Agios Efstratios official island page and municipal beaches page support Ftelio on the west side of Agios Efstratios between Lidario and Gournia, a fairly long beach with sand and small/fine black volcanic pebbles, natural oak-tree shade behind the coast, easy dirt-road access about 9 km from the nearest hamlet and no organized-service context. Promoted to high for static metadata only; unsupported shallow-water certainty was neutralized to medium and unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags are pinned false. Source quiet/tranquillity/ideal-relaxation wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or live calm/protected/safe claims.
